title: loom.lifecycle v1
description: hearth-loom phase transitions + cost deltas + terminal disposition. One event per state transition (not a heartbeat). Distinction from agent.session: lifecycle = state changes; agent.session = heartbeats.

phase_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — when this phase began

tokens_input_delta.description: Input tokens consumed since previous lifecycle event

tokens_output_delta.description: Output tokens generated since previous lifecycle event

cost_delta_usd.description: USD cost incurred since previous lifecycle event

terminal_disposition.description: Only present when phase is terminal: complete, failed, cancelled, or timeout

pr_url.description: Present when phase=complete and a PR was opened

error_summary.description: Short error description for terminal failures

retry_of_task_id.description: If this task is a retry of a prior failed task, the original task_id
